sp_widget.description: Clone of - Knowledge List Widget Template
sp_widget.name: Tasker - Knowledge List Widget Template
sp_widget.template:
${Article Metadata} • ${Article has average rating - {{c.roundOff(f.value)}} out of 5 stars} ${Article has average rating - {{c.roundOff(f.value)}} out of 5 stars} • {{::f.value}} ${View} ${Article has {{::f.value}} view} {{::f.value}} ${Views} ${Article has {{::f.value}} views} • ${State} ${Article is in {{::f.display_value}} state} • • {{::f.label}}: ${Updated} ${Updated} ${Authored by {{::f.display_value}}}
${No content to display}
